summary: Phase F frontend smoke test passed. Verified Manager Intervention panel, AdvisoryPanel 'Create intervention' button, TM follow-up panel, and RBAC visibility across Manager/Admin/TM.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' originating from AdvisoryPanel.jsx line 269 (TM filter <option>). Cosmetic dev-tooling artifact (Emergent injects a span around dynamic JSX expressions inside <option>); does not affect functionality. Pre-existing, not introduced by Phase F.

critical_code_review_comments: InterventionList.jsx is well-factored, uses data-testid on every interactive control, handles loading/empty/error states, soft-delete confirmation, and reuses the Tabs primitive correctly.
AdvisoryPanel correctly gates 'Create intervention' button behind variant !== 'tm' AND Manager/Admin/Owner role — verified TM does not see it.
window.prompt() flow works under headless; consider replacing with a small modal for better UX/test ergonomics in future.
test_credentials: Manager: manager@field.io / manager123; Admin: admin@field.io / admin123; TM: tm1@field.io / tm123
seed_data_creation: None. Created one intervention from insight via UI click (Manager) — soft-state, not destructive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase F UI is fully wired. Verified data-testids: interventions-manager-panel, intervention-tab-{open|in-progress|completed|dismissed}, interventions-filter-{tm|severity|track}, interventions-{status}-empty, insight-create-intervention-{id}, tm-followup-panel. Manager has 8 team insight cards; TM (tm1) has at least 1 manager follow-up (panel rendered). Admin also sees Manager panel on /intervention. Pre-existing hydration warning in AdvisoryPanel TM filter <option> is dev-tooling cosmetic; can be silenced by removing data-ve-dynamic wrapping (out of scope).
